summary: Repo profiling now records the full repository file count separately from the sampled file list.
Auto committee selection now uses the full file count, so min_repo_files thresholds above 200 work as intended.
Planning progress now advances into acceptance_criterion_fallback even when current resets to 0 during sequential fallback.
Added regression tests for sampled-vs-full file counts, auto-mode large-repo selection, fallback progress persistence, and stabilized the existing parallel fallback test.
